body:
America needs Justice Samuel Alito to stay strong!
Peter,

It’s absolutely critical you [**sign this letter of support to Justice Samuel Alito.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2fbd0f6cc124474da46846e480e53fab&_e=9-PY6gVBLLLlCHY0eS646xQL2rE3JV4RJO_fGB8H80S927YVWuURnOPHsrlXenGb2QyHIltkX5WQ2nrxd59lTf-8ybD7yxA9WmMfIXtrwLwtEgfeDAX8Rcmo4omTYmLqEZwnrIQ7NfDIABIjkNELsxyNwaHpihvM3T9d1SBjPVOCezGJf8YJuWocwXYI_E_8Kz7r-O5hphs25X8bWRyCOL5KjHsR0Du6yptXlDtZcYMWEjT1ekGQ80MtEBtWzER-iNaHLfa_29ndhR8hurL58OyheZQA1c-7bRD2l5wPJJPPud1lOLV40fGpxFqi654rd7ydkoCKqVAXwhjJ2rGgbKhqE0W-g08eQ-AOLUUMxX9LKDGxqitmWTgGMWeXvdAYNf4zLPZ5639C8JLOPFdZWmCbpyetsfZeQf3-JtaK4HKG4z7VILLXcmSi6-5ALX9--e6CHCk-HzMZ0YMocNJWIBGzOL5aZiplStzBFP7EGLrbltIauSlyTMaSwFlx3LG3)

The Democrats are causing chaos over the leaked draft opinion the Supreme Court made on Roe v Wade.

They are doing everything they can to intimidate the Justices, and their top target is Justice Samuel Alito.

Justice Samuel Alito has received death threats and around-the-clock proteGAP at his home (something never seen in the history of our country).

He needs to hear from patriotic Americans like you to help him brave this storm of venom and violence, [**so please sign your letter today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2fbd0f6cc124474da46846e480e53fab&_e=9-PY6gVBLLLlCHY0eS646xQL2rE3JV4RJO_fGB8H80S927YVWuURnOPHsrlXenGb2QyHIltkX5WQ2nrxd59lTf-8ybD7yxA9WmMfIXtrwLwtEgfeDAX8Rcmo4omTYmLqEZwnrIQ7NfDIABIjkNELsxyNwaHpihvM3T9d1SBjPVOCezGJf8YJuWocwXYI_E_8Kz7r-O5hphs25X8bWRyCOL5KjHsR0Du6yptXlDtZcYMWEjT1ekGQ80MtEBtWzER-iNaHLfa_29ndhR8hurL58OyheZQA1c-7bRD2l5wPJJM04Tpc3JLEXiNzOaPZMx-lg99haQUdHgzwTzWGLLx21XKSsK-r4Hk3o10PkjTb3v3UXkJU_aB3NPgE5bQts0Qg17BdkyBecM7hm15WXpCepslwU6Zur44Vm6Kzot-gt7VRZz1IgaaKPIvQuSohy6PrepQkv9f2ZoKLrY_BI5xhs4OvQEVvGnOR-AeaoPdS9mPTO194Uyo6QBvvnVCzMnSc)

| May. 20 2022

_Dear Justice Samuel Alito,

Thank you for your brave stance in protecting the lives of the unborn.

The Democrats are trying to threaten and intimidate you, destroying the very foundations of the Supreme Court, but please know millions and millions of Americans like me support you and will not let the Democrats tear down yet another sacred institution of our great nation.

I hope reading this letter will give you strength when you need it. _

Signed,
****YOUR NAME HERE****

| Dear Patriot, The Democrats have launched a shocking new attack on free speech. There's a "Domestic War on Terror" bill that the Biden administration is attempting to carry out. Buried within this atrocious bill is a provision that would cleanse the military and the police of anyone who disagrees with the progressive agenda. **This bill would create an interagency task force to "analyze and combat White supremacist and neo-Nazi infiltration of the uniformed services and Federal law enforcement agencies."** They believe that the military and law enforcement are completely overrun by neo-Nazis and white supremacists. And who do they think fits the bill? We've already seen countless examples of the radical Left labeling anyone they disagree with as a "white supremacist." Former MSNBC host Toure accused Bill Maher (you read that right -- Bill Maher) of being a white supremacist, saying "Does he benefit from white supremacy and white privilege? Absolutely." Joe Rogan, a political moderate, was torched as a "white supremacist" by the Left earlier this year. And the San Francisco Chronicle last year published an op-Ed suggesting that Bernie Sanders (yes, Bernie Sanders!) is a white supremacist because of the mittens he wore at Biden's inauguration. **If the Left thinks all of those people are "white supremacists," can you imagine what they think about you?** It's clear that the Democrats are looking to use "neo-Naziism" and "white supremacy" as excuses to cleanse law enforcement and the military of people whose political views they dislike. I spoke against this awful bill on the Senate floor. [You can read about it here.](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64c1XqlyziIKXPpX3oALl3PdsnNLzrkKOBSt2FS0oeVPOoMgyUaufR-2BKZzO3f96-2By-2B7INUIDHsNAHHbntKd90IjEvPehj6KSzrvZkS6GmfSyLDuUiQ3kFp-2BKflrNQ9YVbAmJ68kf-2BnvjmGeBsh9V4bF96ey9PsH-2BK6Eoy5mvtHp-2BS779PPsWhxrfJ4ff-2F-2FXgeWg-3D-3DxUoQ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhPNoyNNs9JMNQ4Sbb-2BxTu6Dot4OEWya80dAup7vgu6OqYCmjmRI47enRf-2FxV4ojm-2BkDPJP4AW-2BEEg-2BaEMECUd2uonp5rNIcMFwA2EEoMfQt3sPXzbtCJVq-2FI39wzfyZpiEg87kpZmfgFiCqqQGYjxKS1fZx-2Fu-2F2LNNZom8IfcWJ1fUiYzXVuX-2FMCcxnL9p6M4TY2LEU-2FT9tq4hIhMvIiwHBFZDonOsKxnOyDbhofQZw4aEsu54gSfMUElzEvvEcxlu3qxRGQ1lzD52B3nwjjlu6-2FVgEK6mAv-2FTYaQdDs93dnfSR0wZajXE2ZCkA8AhA805XHoAPMl6RFW-2B0Ay-2FasF4GDQnLbWZDMtbk1hHGhWB6Q-3D-3D) **If you want me to continue fighting against the ridiculous progressive agenda, and their dangerous attacks on free speech, will you chip in to my campaign so that I can remain in the U.S. Senate?** [A generous gift of $100, $50, $25, or $10 would go a long way towards helping me fend off the Democrats.](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D06yw_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhPNoyNNs9JMNQ4Sbb-2BxTu6Dot4OEWya80dAup7vgu6OqYCmjmRI47enRf-2FxV4ojm-2BkDPJP4AW-2BEEg-2BaEMECUd2uonp5rNIcMFwA2EEoMfQt3sPXzbtCJVq-2FI39wzfyZpiEg87kpZmfgFiCqqQGYjxKS1fZx-2Fu-2F2LNNZom8IfcWJ1fUiYzXVuX-2FMCcxnL9p6M6teI9lrZ-2BVi-2BOUG-2Bwk1PvMYanf9ucbxCXcKS-2FeG0Rj083q60JBRlFsFn4sIvqiMCqL0So3ny7pLggOR0Q3BpHBXaBg-2F07nPSWewtyOmRBowY-2B8925yRQhi2DMOWzMYQJTxjHQpxmJJOwplxIRMAn-2B1a2eVqqhRJiOABNKhfw8r0A-3D-3D) I refuse to let Biden's "Domestic War on Terror" continue, and I refuse to let free speech die. name: Mary Trump
subject: Democracy is on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Friends—when my uncle and his enablers tried to overturn the will
of the American people and steal the 2020 presidential election, the
guardrails of democracy were bent to their absolute limits.

In fact, if Republicans had been in control of both the House and Senate,
they could have been successful.

restrict abortion access, but there's no doubt they would overturn free
and fair election results if it meant reclaiming power.

Our very democracy is on the ballot this year, friends—we have to
expand our Democratic Senate majority in order to protect it.

body:
America needs Justice Samuel Alito to stay strong!
Fellow Conservative,

It’s absolutely critical you [**sign this letter of support to Justice Samuel Alito.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=47d1ff85651d488180ca3386a0a4a8fe&_e=dNwCIcj8AEZ8pwliKQ7BZ2yhwysrDpxtIoJiq6xThoSj-wqgrm3vwV5-0eYoGs2DZFayRuS3KQPBOe2SEvsQb29WdKPagBCN2iYb9VXt53gaQWqb1_m_7bal0yGA6pYdow87d5nGe_FOuX7uWR0GJZTMfLf1DlOmQHSFcGoZrJKHWGkakDQhVy_3aUizztOwE6d0lc0i9DZ1atCU8TrLpJIIEKDZi9FDOHpahnCJZBgCCWpZbNwaL4PpJjLD2L0u9oG5kPGvZD1l13iwYVO7SuR_hSnkyz-RiTkfk07Pfifx3Ae80mjOJanCeiyvQslsl0mva0_O056hKyzMToDcMmJvrJSa2UN698Se3aIST49HQiZA9MMyZa4FIvWjlLbVkRS660CvdJwYnrD4FLMxAeOFbehgZ-hbu6XPeIGUrF6UUjVQi6HGv7Ue6QFhxsiGITOPU5Db9q2DhHJsGZIF7H8gJ6gK2JcVC_OiVyZJCjBPPt-650NzDBR-2H9h_a3_)

The Democrats are causing chaos over the leaked draft opinion the Supreme Court made on Roe v Wade.

They are doing everything they can to intimidate the Justices, and their top target is Justice Samuel Alito.

Justice Samuel Alito has received death threats and around-the-clock proteGFY2 at his home (something never seen in the history of our country).

He needs to hear from patriotic Americans like you to help him brave this storm of venom and violence, [**so please sign your letter today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=47d1ff85651d488180ca3386a0a4a8fe&_e=dNwCIcj8AEZ8pwliKQ7BZ2yhwysrDpxtIoJiq6xThoSj-wqgrm3vwV5-0eYoGs2DZFayRuS3KQPBOe2SEvsQb29WdKPagBCN2iYb9VXt53gaQWqb1_m_7bal0yGA6pYdow87d5nGe_FOuX7uWR0GJZTMfLf1DlOmQHSFcGoZrJKHWGkakDQhVy_3aUizztOwE6d0lc0i9DZ1atCU8TrLpJIIEKDZi9FDOHpahnCJZBgCCWpZbNwaL4PpJjLD2L0u9oG5kPGvZD1l13iwYVO7SuR_hSnkyz-RiTkfk07PfidEMMIVXfpubLfB3_ff9eRXJEAKKGQShN3PHjaDXgY2rsNRnm2dy3AzXpNzQEaLu4bBAZcaAqPst5MlNT9TG9ldkfKDdnEDZdvLcWUzwbNfF4lIzZFv3fxet_h19Q_WgmaVCV_Ec-ANryeCyw26VpbOZ1uLGDKKVuazTqsv8fmiAedurbOnIGHgVOB3oC-JK90R4uAVElJ-aM8dVcqblsLX)

| May. 20 2022

_Dear Justice Samuel Alito,

Thank you for your brave stance in protecting the lives of the unborn.

The Democrats are trying to threaten and intimidate you, destroying the very foundations of the Supreme Court, but please know millions and millions of Americans like me support you and will not let the Democrats tear down yet another sacred institution of our great nation.

I hope reading this letter will give you strength when you need it. _

Signed,
****YOUR NAME HERE****

[ ADD YOUR NAME ->](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=47d1ff85651d488180ca3386a0a4a8fe&_e=dNwCIcj8AEZ8pwliKQ7BZ2yhwysrDpxtIoJiq6xThoSj-wqgrm3vwV5-0eYoGs2DZFayRuS3KQPBOe2SEvsQb29WdKPagBCN2iYb9VXt53gaQWqb1_m_7bal0yGA6pYdow87d5nGe_FOuX7uWR0GJZTMfLf1DlOmQHSFcGoZrJKHWGkakDQhVy_3aUizztOwE6d0lc0i9DZ1atCU8TrLpJIIEKDZi9FDOHpahnCJZBgCCWpZbNwaL4PpJjLD2L0u9oG5kPGvZD1l13iwYVO7SuR_hSnkyz-RiTkfk07Pfiels1hJ5RyrFYJ1CIIyHm-AxdwrdwTZj_qO2BQk_BIzu5IyI7aMunmmyzBfR3buvFe_MC2GUBmO9qSmyonRHB2YiUKwWgEA4dg5mzkzba_4kBK22xuIH9eZYQhnBPQaZE3BFtUMKmR7tbApRtHgFTNfogyH8UAWY5EfMtrYvR-OwUO4QJsF07iEG-KOFKcqpGhMjD6BtQHU-bNBSoa1W-_k)

body:
Your support allows us to sustain and grow our momentum, and it puts us in a strong position to win this election despite the onslaught of GOP money already rolling in. Folks, we're asking if you’ll chip in just $2 to this email. Wanna know why?

The most recent head-to-head poll of Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson — by a **two-point margin**.

Democrats need to flip Republican seats to hold and expand the Senate majority this year, and political experts consider Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP Senator on the books. We can win this race and flip this seat, but it won't be easy.

Major election forecasters have ranked Wisconsin a toss-up. That’s why national Republicans and Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC are already dumping millions of dollars into our state to try to save Ron Johnson.

name: Dr. Bob
subject: Lest we forget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
The true meaning of Memorial Day is sometimes lost| | | _**We can't honor the true meaning of Memorial Day without acknowledging the deepest wounds of combat.**_
---
**Combat, peacetime, suicide deaths — all who perish in uniform should be memorialized**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45890031/347958825/1280001822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2YwZDU3OC1mNGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f48Y8Jxqzk5aNxFJtswOgoLENMnzHSZLyKjpEtXelnA=)
---
**_Dr. Bob Lorinser, candidate for Congress in Northern Michigan and the UP, reflects on the meaning of Memorial Day, 2022_**
---
| | When he spoke at a ceremony at Gettysburg five years before the first Decoration Day observations, President Lincoln reminded us that through their deeds, fallen soldiers speak from beyond more profoundly for themselves than any of the living ever could. Today, we know Decoration Day as Memorial Day. The name has changed, but our debt to the fallen soldier is eternal. President Lincoln stressed we could only honor the deceased by rededicating ourselves to the cause for which they so willingly gave a last full measure of devotion. Memorial Day is a day when grieving Gold Star mothers place flowers on the graves of their loved ones. It's a day we gather in small communities at cemeteries to pay homage to those who made the ultimate sacrifice. It's a day the Nation pauses, reflects, and remembers. We honor true American heroes, heroes who will never perish in our hearts, who live on in the souls of their families. Their lives are forever illuminated by the light that heroism leaves behind. Our privilege to live with liberty in Northern Michigan, the Upper Peninsula, and across the Nation is because of brave and selfless American heroes who've died in service to their country, not just in battle but in peacetime as well. Over one million soldiers have died during service. Over 7,000 U.S. troops have died in America's wars since 2001. Unfortunately, there are many more poignant consequences of asking so much from our men and women in uniform. Veteran suicide is one of the greatest crises of our time. Since Sept. 11, 2001, over 30,000 veterans have died by suicide — four times more than the number of U.S. military personnel who died in combat in Iraq and Afghanistan. We can't honor the true meaning of Memorial Day without acknowledging the deepest wounds of combat. President Kennedy said, "As we express our gratitude, we must never forget that the highest appreciation is not to utter the words but to live by them." We owe it to our struggling Veterans to do better by them. In remembrance of all those who made the ultimate sacrifice — and those we've lost too early — I wish you and your loved ones a meaningful Memorial Day full of reflection, gratitude, and respect.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45890032/347958826/1280001822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2YwZDU3OC1mNGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f48Y8Jxqzk5aNxFJtswOgoLENMnzHSZLyKjpEtXelnA=)
---

BOB TO CONGRESS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45890033/347958827/1280001822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2YwZDU3OC1mNGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f48Y8Jxqzk5aNxFJtswOgoLENMnzHSZLyKjpEtXelnA=)
---
| | The Friends of Dr. Bob campaign is committed to meaningful content, and we genuinely hope recipients enjoy the quality of stories we share. But, when we're not on the same page as our readers, we've already sent our least favorite kind of message. clean_body: The true meaning of Memorial Day is sometimes lost| | | We can't honor the true meaning of Memorial Day without acknowledging the deepest wounds of combat. Combat, peacetime, suicide deaths — all who perish in uniform should be memorialized = Dr. Bob Lorinser, candidate for Congress in Northern Michigan and the UP, reflects on the meaning of Memorial Day, 2022 | | When he spoke at a ceremony at Gettysburg five years before the first Decoration Day observations, President Lincoln reminded us that through their deeds, fallen soldiers speak from beyond more profoundly for themselves than any of the living ever could. Today, we know Decoration Day as Memorial Day. The name has changed, but our debt to the fallen soldier is eternal. President Lincoln stressed we could only honor the deceased by rededicating ourselves to the cause for which they so willingly gave a last full measure of devotion. Memorial Day is a day when grieving Gold Star mothers place flowers on the graves of their loved ones. It's a day we gather in small communities at cemeteries to pay homage to those who made the ultimate sacrifice. It's a day the Nation pauses, reflects, and remembers. We honor true American heroes, heroes who will never perish in our hearts, who live on in the souls of their families. Their lives are forever illuminated by the light that heroism leaves behind. Our privilege to live with liberty in Northern Michigan, the Upper Peninsula, and across the Nation is because of brave and selfless American heroes who've died in service to their country, not just in battle but in peacetime as well. Over one million soldiers have died during service. Over 7,000 U.S. troops have died in America's wars since 2001. Unfortunately, there are many more poignant consequences of asking so much from our men and women in uniform. Veteran suicide is one of the greatest crises of our time. Since Sept. 11, 2001, over 30,000 veterans have died by suicide — four times more than the number of U.S. military personnel who died in combat in Iraq and Afghanistan. We can't honor the true meaning of Memorial Day without acknowledging the deepest wounds of combat. President Kennedy said, "As we express our gratitude, we must never forget that the highest appreciation is not to utter the words but to live by them." We owe it to our struggling Veterans to do better by them. In remembrance of all those who made the ultimate sacrifice — and those we've lost too early — I wish you and your loved ones a meaningful Memorial Day full of reflection, gratitude, and respect. = = | | The Friends of Dr. Bob campaign is committed to meaningful content, and we genuinely hope recipients enjoy the quality of stories we share. name: Great America Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6079%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=avEassgPtoy3XwjnNcPC5w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62749%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W6dlIrEZFDM5AS5dRjOvXA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62740%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gWEDXqBp52T6UoKXQx%2fNVw&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3k0rk2nrohnbpqb9pr0i4q9s9lr42k15ofej9r8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp34tphcpg68dj5ceq70t30e6oe8tbk6hhnat3lmoqe1p1gcdi76d3lcdpr2tj0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pb6p77mpi6cdj2mdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933clj69o31c3j69oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhm2l56qijt2nft3rqvirq6icc0umv72p59ih8q0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqq5at0j33ifkiudoml8ehu8d510es99uecnq820_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cjh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z87eqtrvm8rsfl5c4qbk1cdlsu3e17fil5kp6588_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cjh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeus3he0i4lvpn6punmddcrdjp446grlqhfl79ag_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cjh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9flhdvafd1voio0hec4sc57t2mjt12cp0pnai28_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cjh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj0l4sn91g7gf7dccbmiv1v3lcc8vo4qn4igece8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo5cgj78ma11duapsvg3oob751acp9u1m2eespk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t7666ob1pjichq3bc73ciq6cs70c9r62slk62or5d5hmormdd1gmuqbdcb1m9g6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljcjjrcp366phb6or7m2qmash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu7tnhj47bb870ih2oklpi6f0f04dnjc9tqdulj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cdh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfuhtiom45k8avnt0pi9q1d2ougda3mg29o4qc88_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cdh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqd1b7l2fl74itvljtuop0vs73oggkqhjkp83hk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76cdh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

---

subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsbeduu5qon181anglmpe1hg79olsh8f1aktt2pg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugq61o70sdqm8c5m6ljjepdnmqpb6o9n69ij1olgs5i70p9mmhq3ac9jmuqmcs77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmapm9ptmchj3coljcgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cpie0ob0spim49fg)
| | | This sponsored message is from Pro Life Update on behalf of Hillsdale College. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd1iqs0l3cc226auns1agdeshle1mcli2kd2crfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76clh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk80bup5783586jcgiq8n692mob5uiuvnhrddfoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76clh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zagk862afsc78n0hr7a7b9d7i0f7ce81repcidr8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76clh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhk2tqe7kqru21pkditedc4qji6e8ociljndismg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76clh2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhq8prh9evu4se1mbn6n1n855fc4olhppoqv9lpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76clh2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: ICYMI News
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc2orfog16kkn6fue3h3v0rpf209frdfh6t37th8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s34chge5djm6drrec31mloeapr1ctj78ojie1qmao3nchgj0p1im6qr0sr7m9gefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p36phimspm4ptncdj31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9lsdi2s2sog38sso6rph7c7qk91rnpc0vucf1c0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76chh2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2s8j8h6hi428b8ueqm8jqp2vsu3rrbnj9928ok8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76chh2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6aa9hhae40vpabrkd62u1rjsjuv9065eb616b48_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76chh2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh79i2kpdpu0mrv7l3tp4v7mvku7tcioa05q2an8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cpie0ob0spi649fg)

name: Team Grassley
subject: RE: Chuck’s Primary Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z69o7otlktkd2r3fni82kn5ttumiap7r47qkcmm8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfatj1mjg7cob4ckpb2olh6sqn2tdjeion9othc3j68ojn6cqn5cj0cdr7copjm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8pmccln6dh6fdr3coq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdimcp70c5geco324no)
Friend, we need you

|

---
Friends,

**Democrats are throwing everything including the kitchen sink at Chuck.** They don’t care that Chuck **is the leader that Iowa needs.** They don’t care that he gets up at 4 AM every day for his morning run. They don’t care that he puts in 12-hour-plus hours a day of work on behalf of the American people. All they care about is power. Can you help us stop them?

| [**STOP THE DEMOCRATS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi6q3l62cct7qmlgb9n9bneit87c5n37iih38nno_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs)
---

We can promise you this. Nobody will ever outwork Chuck Grassley. Not in the Senate, not on the campaign trail, and certainly not on the farm. But all that hard work will mean nothing if the Democrats flood Iowa with dark money to spread lies and smears about him.

To ensure we have the resources to set the record straight, we need to hit our [**primary fundraising deadline**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd8oe7gd0hd3etnn7rvlhlc01knv4mh3d11hslog_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs). We are so close, but we need your help. Pitch in [[**here**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znsk6anh7kn5plbohrsk6gg83ho0adhe05ms260o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs)] to help us reach our goal:

[**CHIP IN $15**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztlr36qbp8mb08a24k70he6l1thb4d72nenfpmeo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1i52s6sjbvlrrrj4aerjd9mjge0dlf3kstbfarg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlgtd6eftq97eqmts8vamhqvmamgjpsh54kt72og_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $75**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3kvl6463e2qd6cc9go09sc0s50h1dasm9omfa5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm2sc7kgk1lpe5nd3s6qc5gjjut5pd6gfkr1pd70_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg62o76c1h2bs)
---

Thank you for supporting Chuck. Your donation will help us win in November with Chuck Grassley at the top of the ticket in Iowa. Thank you for your contribution.

Sincerely,

Team Grassley

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
[unsubscribe](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=6zs1j7skt6bmn2rn3be8ia2d33tqmbovdqkambnn8brhbbh3xv0m08djman2kcupy385jpg9h5cctrlr0s6dgi6w7kpl9nvszoan86d770djju1kxi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyeui0d7n6ziekehfqnp9jjhkeue7p0vn0tanrezewa4dem1dk464bdqs7lvyxhhaokmuoijjkicg97pqpoqf87ks0nwojdrkyamemfk2ub50phvfhpa049fo76iee58624dkyywu8d234im26uczyexuh75w1m355oph970wzfkeobhmf0uu4owbmajceij5p0nccez8xo67tn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Fellow American It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyeujfrm6ry8v1bvfglbyy6hifszmf6n1u9dj13df0136h65wiuoqm4sa8xs9n97rse0opvf3szb7dh6gxyor7vmc64hgpyq20dvqsftmbjbgtyd4obcj8aa0vmy8281y2uruxyqmryxcebh3m8v6v74vd5dac2mntmg40kmvtmfloosv4vzdla4w9ysrqy6tnp52ohaf1vygxj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyeuly3p1aww94y7gna1lmrhggquq9o2e01huyqhfrq1xk29pgiuzgtui97oi0yv6wxc6q6a8kqzxmv0mfim16gz0nk7nfto5qge0yf0uj6maxpkqg1fgp3uahqnzomh22i32wy82yu5qsvs4pknbrxzwz4pfqgttf9moebwumdb6nl1ds2f1glar8vl40nrf9bkpkkcptd3tbw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
[](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyev1qdrijuhl7uhgeoqnkahehoptbtgutfl47blfgd010kp6fmajqgx49f9ublgjars0qfvqs5xkf6fd267z65lmtduf9om8ek0yeevd4qhub55bnpidtupp7u12ypau39cyvy1gfpb24p15ta48o06xv2lk3yaa57cxwsgt48wpnxyldxkncn8m7ttey0b582dbx1djjkw4fl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyev37rue6t7bmrvh90cayjhcim8x5zy8ly2bf13gm3ks3gsldah6l7zomr65rp6ae95grsqvjiwongz7ms595tnwzwgmb78o7198ke2lnzsoeioleblaxj81vxctistk3zq6uxhz098be6y6xpid8qbyr1y2eqhgt66go84rjbrwn888353xxye56r0t7bkt6rx174fuq60dji&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyev503xzrrvrpo7hbb31n6haj83axfpltq6nqo7gbsih6cwec31svwbwn12e4curi2has39brzubguszuc2h4ezgfq5e526rx4th4dy7ui16izwmm22xco2bhbrj6vnq411ctxbr74eps077b3bm4f8zn087t730f4z33lqqd6mdmgfsqa8hsko05ov5fr7f4eqof7h2gptr1o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyev6edauaph5s8hi6prplrhyk5ke1l5bl69ilznh4fhm9yaxat7c3jdenylqg3g6lixusc4gjqt3p6m3d00t4404l7t9wj4ul7ctmd5rc4y10qdwdq5ugcjq7f5osy4g4qbmsxv7q0o13fe8eftf17da6kgo5lm7533nhcapwz5kmtqac7q5o9hh4m1gr4t5357armizmwk25f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyev8xrdpjo6hv5viz1dczahwl3fhu4jsskpuwkrhw6fboueqyhplamg0o8i1vt5k3cnotp00r5rshg3vl9k33ror50ed0e2ypml3scazjp6h45kh8c8rl5e2vigdcakm4eogrxolwhhadzp9ivmnjymb2jssgdtpt1vwztkoq415m3lj1cvr7xrc37wv0fct1u101pk7ceqb92&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyeenv69p6hsc8mk8k47f96xxcn1n7n5qp0wan4c17afjkg0euv2oyo2vqlgfegwlrkj3akte5r7f88lxfth7ydrev8gj78rdxav5cpi4ucv23afghelim8h3czq0ajf81frfobjuop9n77agajthd2t6zjo65ndpj7zilqopppctqnnlov7nvlgmaa0icuiicm9badhxauvvt5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyeepngo8rfesn7y9qew5jrxvd8iqzsj4gea9irg1z1ep1c4xsj8y6b4drxdsu7icveyjbxojz666cif21defy2e2b26qz3pgldddiprobl3i7s15p52fqzbe2d3rl0ya273pnbdmv8ekh19hezmqzt07vhkmg3kw9645d5yo6gxapjj7a2oxrnq5zxvxo868az31mgj64c06x2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21b6ga9gfscynguot0aex1vwskqdsyeer4ur3ae46q4m9hsiuxaxte6du3yahowdhtck22qce4y8qrnqhd26ls7a37x8tzyodc8834j4w9wyum1crxq4oghti2knkph0q2okwj7acn78rgt5cv2wsqgeh93s42wcjmbx2c4oyuggiip2jvhv8rgwrui5cx4wquiin0nshpwurlxthmyk0yv29jjrwylioijkcwjsfbf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor | | | | Fellow American It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more. Fellow American thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z81po3n6uapkendlfurc3jstkdlurnm7mul31c0g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjecp3cohj6lp62dr3mjj7eob6e5g64cb7mhhj2pbi6hq37cj26ep67cdhm5p3eduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdimdiefdj6cooj1cr0suobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb6cjg66or2chh2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zok4gvg5vhflaaempfr77lim66ablk5a6lnadtio_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg66or2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc55k7u56sskeic9cll4jjnn8idtghl4nplcs3lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg66or2chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt65tghdvjghcvjskdqsngo2vju5bc0tqgup0mu8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg66or2chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z4528mg79uuffrtuu8jnl721slrjetech3p132ao).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zobgo0hq6rlr283l3rqcnpea4ooocobuibrrvh08_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg66or2chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9049%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7Fwj596iNqLWOEfktjVbUA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22431%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gwKMxWCeJlpoicDFd3eHlA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ -- but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22432%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fX55fC%2fr7gvmMv7cfOFsPQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22433%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PsepKsXdp2XW%2bUJP6pRTWw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22431%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gwKMxWCeJlpoicDFd3eHlA&sysid=1)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22434%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cloA0S055vzCWbca1MGC0A&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22433%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PsepKsXdp2XW%2bUJP6pRTWw&sysid=1)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22431%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gwKMxWCeJlpoicDFd3eHlA&sysid=1)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22445%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HLOM2cD3Icxfxq96BUB80Q&sysid=1) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22446%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SdcqYtXsivkq5sg1xtXnHg&sysid=1)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22431%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gwKMxWCeJlpoicDFd3eHlA&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22433%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PsepKsXdp2XW%2bUJP6pRTWw&sysid=1)
---

---

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: American Action News
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrt3l8k93s412kt3m17h27g3i1e41jcejq7fq98_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg61ob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1p3765pnecrm6mqb4o30s9pjdd746sqjcpr7c3ijatdh69p31pr46gqr8t7661jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8pmccln6di6fchjcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcc2sjhgtt9qgkdip5s4i57jrg7heqv3epk4km60_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg61ob6c5h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2r87b1f5ljf5uaeo1j5gl3th9eqkqj05lkhnjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg61ob6c5h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zic44on1drv2mqv610114qie8ms1q0u8cjqeb688_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cjg61ob6c5h2bs)
---

name: Rob Ortt
subject: Remembering and Honoring our Fallen Troops this Memorial Day 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE
body:
May 30, 2022
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016YxNAus1k0G3lvzQMxhoAuOdb8trWV9zzjVbWLXrooI_NrKtckptG5OtXcyzxN693yADaPJeq5JHHbrmpHQdlVuhUWuCz9mE58cop8bJhU6eSyFLKMevRuS0dSC6Tr7D8m2AtfaLg8rJ1HGTjMXIkQ==&c=WUD7Z6QszWxj-16nYDHTjD7xl6MY9zjbHaZXCOyGbpTYt_6osXzBww==&ch=MzNSg1vRowDKAKbUMLWmFxW9j3Umndd39mKsKRuhvlXLpeKGzvuGiA==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,
On Memorial Day, we recognize the countless brave service members who died in the line of duty to protect our country. To those who made the ultimate sacrifice, and to everyone touched by this type of loss - you have my eternal thanks, and the gratitude of an entire nation.
I am a proud Veteran of the United States Army, where I served in Operation Enduring Freedom in Afghanistan. Many refer to myself and my fellow veterans as "heroes" - which means a lot to me. But, the truth is, the real heroes are the servicemen and women who tragically never returned home. They paid for our freedom with the ultimate sacrifice. It is incumbent on all Americans to think about them - their lives, their unfinished stories, and their families and loved ones - on this Memorial Day.
---
|
---
| As you look upon the flag, as you read the constitution, and as you hold your loved ones close today and everyday - remember that it is because of our fallen heroes that we are afforded these freedoms, liberties, and luxuries.
As New Yorkers, let's always keep our fallen American service members in our hearts, in our prayers, and on our minds this Memorial Day.
God bless you, God bless our fallen warriors, and God bless the United States of America.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
| Senator Rob Ortt
---
| |
---
Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media:
---

name: Governor Roy Cooper
subject: Honoring our fallen troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
My reflections on Memorial Day: |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45891326/347962568/823540626?refcode=ea.2130720f-10e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.2130720f-10e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTMwNzIwZi0xMGUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=td_7mAl0PL2eZnWokvilVzRwGKYzVQiW3A34fi1hVxM=&emci=c260ac3e-72dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2130720f-10e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Today on Memorial Day we take time out of our busy lives to remember and honor the Americans who died serving our country. I am thinking about the brave women and men of North Carolina, who left home to protect our country and our state and never returned. I am thinking about their parents, siblings, spouses, and children, who mourn their loss today and every day. Some of my most challenging days as Governor are when I learn we have lost a North Carolinian in the line of duty. Because brave Americans have been willing to step up and defend our country, I am able to say what I want, do what I want, go where I want, and run for elective office if I want. That kind of freedom has a price, and I am grateful every day for the people who have paid that price and given that freedom to me as well as other Americans. We must honor their sacrifices by working to uphold the values of democracy, freedom, and equality. Thank you for taking the time to read my reflections, and may you have a safe and meaningful holiday weekend. Thank you, Roy
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45891330/347962569/2039383177?refcode=ea.2130720f-10e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.2130720f-10e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTMwNzIwZi0xMGUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=td_7mAl0PL2eZnWokvilVzRwGKYzVQiW3A34fi1hVxM=&emci=c260ac3e-72dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2130720f-10e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176) Cooper for North Carolina

clean_body: My reflections on Memorial Day: | Peter, Today on Memorial Day we take time out of our busy lives to remember and honor the Americans who died serving our country. I am thinking about the brave women and men of North Carolina, who left home to protect our country and our state and never returned. I am thinking about their parents, siblings, spouses, and children, who mourn their loss today and every day. Some of my most challenging days as Governor are when I learn we have lost a North Carolinian in the line of duty. Because brave Americans have been willing to step up and defend our country, I am able to say what I want, do what I want, go where I want, and run for elective office if I want. That kind of freedom has a price, and I am grateful every day for the people who have paid that price and given that freedom to me as well as other Americans. We must honor their sacrifices by working to uphold the values of democracy, freedom, and equality. Thank you for taking the time to read my reflections, and may you have a safe and meaningful holiday weekend. Thank you, Roy mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Friends,

I’ll keep this quick because it’s important: I just had a meeting with my staff, and we’ve noticed a pretty significant dip in funds raised this month from 34223 compared to last. We can’t afford to fall short if we’re going to beat Ron DeSantis: **_[Can you rush a quick donation now to help us catch up?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45891624/347963645/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220530_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzg1M2JjMi0xMGUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-m_UVswI1BcR8llKcRde6AZoZQ5xABOhPMiW4IBjX70=)_**
**March goal: MET
April goal: MET
May goal: ???**
Normally I wouldn’t be so concerned, but a recent poll shows I’m the candidate best positioned to defeat DeSantis in November — which puts a _major_ target on my back starting right now.

We all know DeSantis has plenty of far-right, out-of-state billionaire pals who he can call on to help bail him out. In fact, he’s already called in a few favors and dropped _$5.3 million_ on a recent ad buy.

I don’t have right-wing billionaires. I have grassroots supporters like you pitching in $10, $20, or even $50 at a time. And since we’re participating in the Florida Election Campaign Financing Act’s match program, each contribution of $250 or less from an individual will be _matched_ by the state.

**Can I count on you to make a donation before our quarterly deadline to help us get back where we need to be and DEFEAT Ron DeSantis?**

name: Crystal
subject: Memorial Day
body:
| | | Peter, It's easy to get lost in enjoying the three-day weekend provided by Memorial Day, but I want to encourage everyone to take some time today to really reflect on what it means. This Memorial Day, let's pause to remember and honor those who made the ultimate sacrifice to protect our nation and the freedoms we hold dear. God bless all our fallen heroes and the families of those who have given their lives in protection of our great country. From the patriots who lost their lives defending American liberty and fighting tyranny during the first battles of the American Revolution to those lost during ongoing operations across the globe - every single one deserves honor and recognition. We owe them an enormous debt of gratitude. Without them, our country wouldn't exist as all. Let's all remember the bravery and sacrifices others have made for us, and do what we can to honor those who laid their lives down. In remembrance, Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress
---

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Let’s not forget who we remember and honor today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
On this Memorial Day, please join me in pausing to reflect on who this day is really about – and how much we owe them and their loved ones. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45892171/347965369/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGQ2ODEzZS0xNGUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ma4Z_aRpb341X64aSF0TGkrLYk2a3N3S162pJVZfAJk=&emci=d7b5c5ba-cbdd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c4d6813e-14e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15529135) | On this Memorial Day, please join me in pausing to reflect on who this day is really about – and how much we owe them and their loved ones. Today, we remember and honor the servicemembers who gave their lives to protect our country and safeguard our freedoms. Their sacrifice and bravery allow us to live freely. Today, let us all step back and remember what binds us as a country. Despite our many differences, we all are bound by the fundamental beliefs at the core of our nation: the unalienable rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness. These core values are what unite us. These principles are what so many of our fellow Americans have fought and died to protect. The best way to honor our fallen heroes is to remember their lives and offer support to our Gold Star families and the loved ones left behind. I will continue to use my office to ensure our government meets its obligations to those still serving, to veterans, and their families – here in Connecticut’s Fifth District and across the country. So as we spend Memorial Day with our families and friends, please take the time to reflect on the meaning of this day and remember our fallen servicemembers. – Jahana
---

clean_body: On this Memorial Day, please join me in pausing to reflect on who this day is really about – and how much we owe them and their loved ones. | | On this Memorial Day, please join me in pausing to reflect on who this day is really about – and how much we owe them and their loved ones. Today, we remember and honor the servicemembers who gave their lives to protect our country and safeguard our freedoms. Their sacrifice and bravery allow us to live freely. Today, let us all step back and remember what binds us as a country. Despite our many differences, we all are bound by the fundamental beliefs at the core of our nation: the unalienable rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness. These core values are what unite us. These principles are what so many of our fellow Americans have fought and died to protect. The best way to honor our fallen heroes is to remember their lives and offer support to our Gold Star families and the loved ones left behind. I will continue to use my office to ensure our government meets its obligations to those still serving, to veterans, and their families – here in Connecticut’s Fifth District and across the country. So as we spend Memorial Day with our families and friends, please take the time to reflect on the meaning of this day and remember our fallen servicemembers. – Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Peter, Today is Memorial Day! We hope you have a safe and enjoyable holiday with your loved ones. On this special day, we honor our fallen heroes who gave their lives so that we can live freely in the greatest country on earth.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/7745c55866f2ff28/3e4b14c30aa25a44c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

We must never forget the men and women who paid the ultimate price for our freedom. We can’t let their sacrifice be in vain. They gave their last full measure of devotion to our nation, and we hope you’ll join us in taking a few moments to reflect on their sacrifice. -Kevin Hern and Team Hern

clean_body: Will you take a moment to remember the fallen? Read more >> | | | Peter, Today is Memorial Day! We hope you have a safe and enjoyable holiday with your loved ones. On this special day, we honor our fallen heroes who gave their lives so that we can live freely in the greatest country on earth. We must never forget the men and women who paid the ultimate price for our freedom. We can’t let their sacrifice be in vain. They gave their last full measure of devotion to our nation, and we hope you’ll join us in taking a few moments to reflect on their sacrifice. -Kevin Hern and Team Hern id:2022-04-25-17:54:14:871t | | ---|--- | | Paid For By Hern For Congress | | id:2022-05-16-12:52:36:927t

| | Folks, Today and every day we honor all the fallen heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. We live freely thanks to them. Here in Coastal Virginia, we are acutely aware of the significance Memorial Day holds. Today, I’m remembering my USNA 1997 classmates, LT Jonas Panik, LT Thomas Adams, CAPT Franklin Hooks, SGT Steve Morin, and LT Michael McGreevy and keeping their loved ones in my thoughts and prayers. As we reflect on the service and sacrifice of our military members and families, may we also recommit ourselves to supporting the families who have lost loved ones in service to our country. I’m committed to working in Congress to ensure that our servicemembers and their families receive the benefits they have earned, and I fought to repeal an unjust tax hike on Gold Star families. Our work is far from over. For the sake of all those who have served and made the ultimate sacrifice, we must continue to work across party lines to do what’s right for our veterans and their families during these exceptionally difficult times. I will never stop fighting for you, Elaine Luria
---

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Today and every day we honor all the fallen heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. We live freely thanks to them. Here in Coastal Virginia, we are acutely aware of the significance Memorial Day holds. Today, I’m remembering my USNA 1997 classmates, LT Jonas Panik, LT Thomas Adams, CAPT Franklin Hooks, SGT Steve Morin, and LT Michael McGreevy and keeping their loved ones in my thoughts and prayers. As we reflect on the service and sacrifice of our military members and families, may we also recommit ourselves to supporting the families who have lost loved ones in service to our country. I’m committed to working in Congress to ensure that our servicemembers and their families receive the benefits they have earned, and I fought to repeal an unjust tax hike on Gold Star families. Our work is far from over. For the sake of all those who have served and made the ultimate sacrifice, we must continue to work across party lines to do what’s right for our veterans and their families during these exceptionally difficult times. I will never stop fighting for you, Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support Elaine for Congress, click below to make a donation! | | = Paid for by Elaine for Congress PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466 United States Elaine Luria is a retired member of the US Navy.
