name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m going to get real for a second
disclaimer_text: paid for by YOU!!!!
body:
We are facing some of the biggest fights we’ve faced as a nation in a long time.
#
Derek,
I’m going to get *real* for a second. Stick with me, okay? 😁
I don’t think I need to tell you just how important this election in November is, Derek. The past few weeks or, like, even the past two YEARS have been so, so hard.
Hard for frontline workers, hard for working families, and hard for every last person who has had to live through the seemingly non-stop dumpster fire of bad news + MAGA Republicans.
So believe me when I tell you: **I'm ready to fight like hell.**
The fights we face today — gun violence, threats to abortion access, the fact that the national minimum wage hasn’t increased since 2009, and so much more — are some of the biggest struggles we as a nation have faced in a long time.
And with fights as big as these, we deserve leaders who are going to give it all they’ve got to make this country a better place for everyone.
**I'm that person, Derek. 😁**
I promise you that I will *never* pull some of the stalling techniques that so-called Democrats have been pulling.
I will *never* put an archaic rule like the filibuster before the rights + safety of my fellow Americans.
And I will *never* fund my campaign with corporate PACs or fossil fuel money, because I am bought and paid for by YOU!!!!
When there is so much to be devastated, and quite frankly, pissed off about, it’s easy to lose hope. I’m just as frustrated as you are about the world today.
But I need you to listen to me: Not giving it our all this November and letting the Republicans buy their way into the Senate won’t fix anything.
**Democrats need to buck up, lean in, and get sh*t done. If you agree this is what it’s gonna take to save our Democratic majority, then I need you by my side during this campaign.**
Because I know, with your help, we can flip PA blue and deliver that 51st Democratic vote needed to abolish the filibuster, codify _Roe v. Wade_ , pass common sense (and wildly popular!) gun reform, and make this country *actually* work for working people.
[**So, what do you say? Can you help make our campaign vision a reality by rushing a donation of any amount you can afford today? Every single dollar makes a difference in this fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220530-1?refcode=em20220530-6024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6024_434096_oojjFK&akid=6024%2E434096%2EoojjFK)
**[Rush a donation →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220530-1?refcode=em20220530-6024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6024_434096_oojjFK&akid=6024%2E434096%2EoojjFK)**
Thank you for your continued support in this campaign, Derek.
— John
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220530-1?refcode=em20220530-6024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6024_434096_oojjFK&akid=6024%2E434096%2EoojjFK)
**_I couldn’t help but wonder..._**** _[Can Artie + I count on your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220530-1?refcode=em20220530-6024&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6024_434096_oojjFK&akid=6024%2E434096%2EoojjFK)_**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220530-6024-footer&t=2&refcode2=6024_434096_oojjFK&akid=6024%2E434096%2EoojjFK)**

clean_body: We are facing some of the biggest fights we’ve faced as a nation in a long time. Derek, I’m going to get real for a second. Stick with me, okay? 😁 I don’t think I need to tell you just how important this election in November is, Derek. The past few weeks or, like, even the past two YEARS have been so, so hard. Hard for frontline workers, hard for working families, and hard for every last person who has had to live through the seemingly non-stop dumpster fire of bad news + MAGA Republicans. So believe me when I tell you: I'm ready to fight like hell. The fights we face today — gun violence, threats to abortion access, the fact that the national minimum wage hasn’t increased since 2009, and so much more — are some of the biggest struggles we as a nation have faced in a long time. And with fights as big as these, we deserve leaders who are going to give it all they’ve got to make this country a better place for everyone. I'm that person, Derek. 😁 I promise you that I will never pull some of the stalling techniques that so-called Democrats have been pulling. I will never put an archaic rule like the filibuster before the rights + safety of my fellow Americans. And I will never fund my campaign with corporate PACs or fossil fuel money, because I am bought and paid for by YOU!!!! When there is so much to be devastated, and quite frankly, pissed off about, it’s easy to lose hope. I’m just as frustrated as you are about the world today. But I need you to listen to me: Not giving it our all this November and letting the Republicans buy their way into the Senate won’t fix anything. Democrats need to buck up, lean in, and get sht done. If you agree this is what it’s gonna take to save our Democratic majority, then I need you by my side during this campaign. Because I know, with your help, we can flip PA blue and deliver that 51st Democratic vote needed to abolish the filibuster, codify Roe v. Wade , pass common sense (and wildly popular!) gun reform, and make this country actually work for working people. Thank you for your continued support in this campaign, Derek. — John I couldn’t help but wonder...** | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Ultimate Sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=memorial_day_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- Memorial Day, by its very nature, prompts us to reflect on the past. This is the weekend that our nation collectively remembers, thanks, and mourns those who paid the ultimate cost for us to live in freedom. These brave men and women are the epitome of COUNTRY FIRST -- they gave their last breath in defense of our nation and constitution. Their sacrifice was not for a political party or president, but for all of us. **And it is up to the living to make our nation worthy of that gift every day.** With enduring gratitude for the glorious men and women we honor this weekend, I hope we all will seize the opportunity to take a break from the bad news, unplug from toxicity, enjoy the ones we love, and thank God for America and her heroes. Country First, Adam PS: Country First's [volunteers](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=memorial_day_nd&n=2) are the backbone and inspiration for this movement. We have an active community of people from across the political spectrum and all walks of life who share a desire to find common ground and solutions to our nation's challenges. name: Tom Perez
subject: I can’t do this without you Peter
body:
Peter, I have a short message for you.

We’re nearly 50 days away from Maryland’s primary elections.

Our campaign is kicking into overdrive to win in July, and take a major step towards flipping Maryland blue for the first time in nearly 10 years. We have volunteers on the ground to register voters, we’re distributing yard signs, and I’m traveling all across Maryland to talk to voters about the issues they care about most.

**[We need to invest right now if we’re going to flip Maryland blue in November. _Our campaign is growing and gaining momentum faster than ever._

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I’m reaching out today to ask you to support my husband, Mark, so he can hold Arizona’s Senate seat. Please, give me a chance to explain why this is so important.
I know just how hard these campaigns can be. It is not easy at all. National Republicans see people like Mark, who are independent and put their constituents first, as a threat. That’s why we’ve always known that outside groups would come out of the woodwork, spending untold amounts of money to try and take back this Senate seat in 2022.
In addition to that outside spending, Donald Trump has already flown to Arizona to hold a rally and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” He plans to make an endorsement at any moment, which is really going to kick this race into high gear.
It's clear Trump and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to beat Mark. So what can we do about it?
Mark needs our help to fight off these attacks, and the best way to do that is by making sure he reaches his May fundraising goal. We can’t afford to fall short. So what do you say?
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to Mark’s people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our May goals.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220530-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2938_6688874_f5yrIX&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220530-1-7&t=20&refcode2=2938_6688874_f5yrIX&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220530-1-7&t=21&refcode2=2938_6688874_f5yrIX&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220530-1-7&t=22&refcode2=2938_6688874_f5yrIX&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220530-1-7&t=23&refcode2=2938_6688874_f5yrIX&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220530-1-7&t=24&refcode2=2938_6688874_f5yrIX&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220530-1-7&t=25&refcode2=2938_6688874_f5yrIX&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX)**
---
****
Mark is working so hard for Arizona in the Senate. To hold this seat, he is going up against National Republicans and outside groups that will do anything to stop him. That’s why your support, no matter the amount, is greatly appreciated by me, by Mark, and the whole campaign.
Thank you so much,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=2938%2E6688874%2Ef5yrIX).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

body:

But while President Biden works to secure our nation and democracy, **Republicans are still slamming him and obstructing his agenda at every turn.**

We need to show President Biden that Democrats are standing with him during this pivotal moment -- _but we’re still missing 28 responses from Pennsylvania!_

**Please, lock in your response before midnight:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: No matter how you honor Memorial Day, I hope you have a meaningful day.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Growing up with brothers in the military gave Memorial Day a special meaning: | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45916304/348035148/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ5O_MEM_E_20220530_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDUwMjcyMi0zZGUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTMtfgew5BEnynj5xLg4FdcJXdvNOusYlYeITKsmgus=&emci=56464a7f-3be0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e0502722-3de0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
---
My first memory of my oldest brother, Don Reed, is from the morning he left to join the Air Force. He was nineteen; I was three.

The memory is like a five-second home-movie fragment that plays in my head. It’s 1953. We’ve driven to Oklahoma City, where he will report for duty. My mother and I are standing close together on a sidewalk, her full cotton skirt blowing around me. She’s crying. He’s halfway up some steps when he turns. Squinting in the blisteringly bright Oklahoma sun, he waves and gives us a quick wink. Then the memory is over. Six days a week, my mother rushed to the mailbox to see if there was a letter from Don Reed — or later on, from my brother John or my brother David, after each of them went off to the military. When a letter came from one of the boys, the day was extra-sunny. She would read it and re-read it and call my aunts or my grandmother to read it again over the phone. My brothers all made it home safely, and for that, I’m eternally grateful. Growing up with brothers in the military gave Memorial Day a special meaning: Understanding what others have lost and honoring even more the sacrifice of those who died in service to our country and those who love them. We owe them a debt that can never be repaid. In Washington, I’ll keep pushing our government to make decisions in the best interest of our service members, their families, and our national security. That includes taking care of our veterans when they come home and saying no to forever wars. No matter how you honor Memorial Day, I hope you have a meaningful day. Elizabeth

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: A few thoughts for today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wfSmPpdeVH2VzZQlz48rBBpp-pLnBr3g-1EHI8LPQsM=/oc89QqBA4BptJnKAch8XL3DEgpNDCPIPq7gZAuA1_h8=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Our nation has been through a lot recently, and, while I hope you are able to enjoy time off and spend this day with family and loved ones, I also hope you take a moment to pause and reflect on those that are no longer with us and honor those who have paid the ultimate sacrifice to protect our freedoms.
Our country is what it is today because of those who gave everything to protect our freedoms. Today, we pay tribute to those who lost their lives in service to our country and acknowledge the shared sacrifice of their families. In Washington, I am committed to fighting for our servicemembers and veterans to ensure they receive the benefits they deserve, and ask you to stand with me in honoring the brave men and women we have lost in service to our country today.
Thank you for taking a moment to reflect today on our freedoms, thank those who help protect them every day, and remember those who sacrificed their lives to do so.
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

name: Bill Pascrell
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pascrell for Congress, Inc
body:
Today, we stand in solemn remembrance of all our fallen heroes | | | Team, On this Memorial Day, we stand in solemn remembrance of the brave Americans who gave their lives for our nation and our ideals. **It's our duty to make sure their memory is never forgotten, and their sacrifice is never in vain.** Our democracy and our freedoms are precious. Generations of soldiers have given their lives to defend them. The least we can do is continue that fight. I'm proud to do everything I can in Congress to protect our democracy and our brave heroes in uniform. I hope you'll join me in saluting the men and women who've answered the call to serve and laid down their lives for us and our nation. Thank you, — Bill Pascrell
---

The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families.

Peter,
We wrote to you the other day to tell you how dire this end-of-month goal is, but we’re still just **$15,500** behind.
_This isn't your average election year... We’re up against the SWAMP, we’re up against the ESTABLISHMENT, and we’re up against a 41-YEAR POLITICAL MONARCHY-- we can’t afford to fall behind._

clean_body: | | | | We must hold onto this momentum... | Peter, We wrote to you the other day to tell you how dire this end-of-month goal is, but we’re still just $15,500 behind. This isn't your average election year... We’re up against the SWAMP, we’re up against the ESTABLISHMENT, and we’re up against a 41-YEAR POLITICAL MONARCHY-- we can’t afford to fall behind. We only have until the end-of-month deadline at MIDNIGHT TOMORROW to close this fundraising gap. Which is why Kelly has secured a DOUBLE IMPACT for the next HOUR to put us over the top. | | | | | | Thank you, Team Tshibaka \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Tshibaka Date: Sunday, May 29, 2022 Subject: We can’t let up To: Peter, When you’re only 80 days out from a historic primary election, you can’t come up short on your fundraising goals, or else the Establishment will win. But unfortunately, we’re short on our May End-of-Month goal. The swamp has millions at their disposal to try and defeat us,which is why we can’t afford to fall behind even on just ONE deadline. | | | | | | Our campaign is gaining tremendous speed, and the attacks against Kelly have ramped up tenfold. But Kelly doesn’t care if they mock, attack, or lie about her. Nothing will stop her from fulfilling her mission to win this seat for the people of Alaska AND America. If anything, she wears their attacks as a badge of honor. Because the more they attack her, the more she knows our campaign is on target. Even Murkowski herself has admitted in the New York Times , “I may not be re-elected.” All this proves that we’re gaining momentum, but now we have to crush this fundraising goal if we want to keep it. you, Team Tshibaka | STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | ==

body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=b02da4eb59&u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=fcfa8c5896)
---
| | | _May 29, 2022_
---
| [ ](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=0f07d6dfdd&e=b02da4eb59)
---
|
---
| |
# Vote Dr. Cordie For Senate June 7th Full-Term
**3 Ways To Get Involved Now**
---
| 1.[Donate](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=27ee6453c1&e=b02da4eb59)[ Now](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=a6a68efe58&e=b02da4eb59): We are in the process of raising $40,000 to send out 2 Million more text messages, we have currently raised $15,000.
2\. Get involved in any county in California and go door to door canvasing, handing out yard signs.
3\. Come to [The Freedom Tour](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=a6a823d829&e=b02da4eb59) and see Rachel Hamm and Dr. Cordie! the tour starts Sunday, May 29th and ends Sunday June 5th!
4\. Call TEN people that you know right now and on election day and tell them to vote Dr. Cordie. Get Involved. We need your help! Let's win this thing.
---
|
---
| [Donate Now](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=6563d6bb62&e=b02da4eb59 "Donate Now")
---
| [Download The Freedom Tour Flyer](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=599e4ed5d3&e=b02da4eb59 "Download The Freedom Tour Flyer")
---
|
---
| | **LITTLE CORDIE LEARNS ABOUT GAS PRICES**
---
|
---
| [Click Here To Watch](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=b4cdd7216c&e=b02da4eb59)
---
|
---
| | **JOIN US MONDAY, MAY 30TH**
---
|
---
| Please email courtney@cordie4senate.com and kelly@cordie4senate.com to volunteer for the Bus Tour!
---
|
---
| | **RECENT PRESS INTERVIEWS**
---
| | | [ ](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=149372c2ab&e=b02da4eb59)
---
| Good Morning San Diego **| KUSI NEWS** [Click Here To Watch](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=c92ebf9257&e=b02da4eb59)
---
|
---
| | **HOW TO FIND WILLIAMS ON THE ELECTION BALLOT**
---
| There have been questions about the special term, limited term (now that people are receiving their ballots) and we wanted to address in order for us all to be on the same page and saying the same thing. Dr. Cordie is not on the special election/limited term ballot because he joined the race after the cut off date to be added to the election. Voters need to skip that portion and vote Dr. Cordie Williams wherever his name is on the ballot. Newsom should have allowed Californians to decide via a vote 1 year ago, but being the tyrant that he is, took it upon himself to appoint our California Legislative representative. The 3 month term "special election" has no bearing on Dr. Cordies ability to change California, the 6 year term is what will make the difference!
---
|
---
| | **CAMPAIGN RESOURCES**
---
| [Download Campaign Flyer](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=4a1f80d049&e=b02da4eb59 "Download Campaign Flyer")
---
| [Download Tri-fold Brochure](https://cordie4senate.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=78368b8145bb13f0b83fc19e8&id=f2afab57e1&e=b02da4eb59 "Download Tri-fold Brochure")
---
|
---
| I want to thank you for your prayers and your generosity. _**With your continued support, I'll be able to do what a Marine does - fight for you. **_
Dr. Cordie Williams
USMC Veteran
Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: We need to make sure we’re doing all we can to defeat corrupt politicians like David Schweikert | = | We’re only one day away from our end-of-month deadline, and we still haven’t met our goal. We need to make sure we’re doing all we can to defeat corrupt politicians like David Schweikert, so meeting deadlines like this one is critical to our success. = | = David Schweikert has continued to show the people of Arizona how truly ineffective he is as a leader. Instead of working in Congress to improve the lives of Arizonans, he has done the opposite. He’s voted against policies that would cap insulin prices at $35 and bring in more baby formula for our children. He’s been fined by the Federal Election Commission for misusing campaign donations and by the House Ethics Committee for misusing taxpayer money. Jevin, on the other hand, is a trusted community leader. He is the president of Arizona’s longest-running Head Start and has a track record of helping working families. He’s been endorsed by numerous organizations, labor unions, and local leaders, who recognize that Jevin is the best person to represent AZ-01. body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/G_ujO8qD-cKhJdJvMsViapFvx-ZeZlXoAmC4h7_OzG4=/HFpWsi2TpkQbA7GPESrVj7NIHlW2VMlkX0b3S1pp4oY=)
---
Being a woman living in a country where you will soon have *fewer* protections than assault rifles is _not_ very fun.
The Republican party has made it clear that they care more about NRA money than the health and safety of women and children. So I think it's time to get them the hell out of office.
**Our end-of-month fundraiser ends tomorrow, and we 're a few dollars short of hitting our goal.**
**[Will you help us elect women dedicated to fighting for families, not special interests by donating now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/G_ujO8qD-cKhJdJvMsViapFvx-ZeZlXoAmC4h7_OzG4=/XR2k5gnRe2ShOITO4Xwf0qKJL2OC71QfxO6rvIn3Tn0=?refcode=X_053022_EOM_C)**
Thank you!
-- _Katie_

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time**[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/G_ujO8qD-cKhJdJvMsViapFvx-ZeZlXoAmC4h7_OzG4=/iMbZz7pzt2Ehw8Yh2j0vsFXYws_RAh2PVwEFXq0xWZw=?refcode=footer)**, and**[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/G_ujO8qD-cKhJdJvMsViapFvx-ZeZlXoAmC4h7_OzG4=/HFpWsi2TpkQbA7GPESrVj7NIHlW2VMlkX0b3S1pp4oY=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: We remember 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]"Patriotism is not short, frenzied outbursts of emotion, but the tranquil and steady dedication of a lifetime." –Adlai E. Stevenson II

I want to take some time to put the everyday tasks of the campaign to the side for a moment and focus on something bigger than all of that: Memorial Day.
Memorial Day is a very special time of year when we stop to reflect, memorialize and say thanks to the people who made tremendous sacrifices for us. Today, we’re meant to honor those who gave everything in service to this country.
Let us not forget that the folks whose lives we remember today, were people just like us. Fathers, mothers, sons, daughters, brothers, and sisters. All with their own stories, their own hobbies, their own loved ones, and all cut too short. It’s important we realize what they fought for so that we may truly honor their sacrifices.
When I get to Congress, I intend to respect those sacrifices and fight for legislation that truly promotes our democracy and ensures freedom for all Americans.
I hope you have a wonderful and safe Memorial Day.
Wiley Nickel
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Newsletter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, **We want to start this Newsletter by wishing you and your family a safe, peaceful, and meaningful Memorial Day.** Especially in the wake of so much recent tragedy, it is important to commit ourselves to remembering the cost of war and violence and doing all we can to strive for peace, both here at home and around the world. We know that it’s time for some damn change – and that’s what this campaign is about. We’ve been putting up big road signs around MD-05 to spread the word and make sure we reach every person we can, including those who are brand-new to our district! [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFAc3Wx6QcT5KV8XYmGwPOKEm6DYnwjAPkJ3TEn3ugdlr3heVW1feDGWNaNg89WLFyghyzZWVIfengr3s-MizG50zmzw18EVl5dhB7elmSE1cfH9pW9Zld5pFGB_Yhsg3gQpyFLZV3XYNvF1gPSUPaDawkH30vuNBinZOIOVXawUzHYrMLhtef6fp9mp8nckmTtfvjS2PwOkXCkjX_0JQitnVbs8OrxaU__QtXKnURkYTrcrGIi_RLq3mLXfAw_WGHesHSnrtOHJhwLeHGCl7R/3mh/XfKreECVTMeP84lrhOGb8w/h0/HcxM-br7xrsq3DJzjyqo2C3uPkkhgMHrRcL3AiYdGHI) Our campaign was just awarded the 2022 Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate distinction. We understand the urgency that is required to act on gun violence as a public health crisis. No more relying on just thoughts and prayers, because it’s clearly not enough. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFAc3Wx6QcT5KV8XYmGwPOKEm6DYnwjAPkJ3TEn3ugdmw1__3SuQlD_dk02n_3F_rigsLzipzYBGhbm6vz0kyRrIyduIeI5hb4CJGcSBVsDNjcd9mOGiemtC5PkWBeya9fA6wnbpWE7eQ0pC8uoSywk25pD06IPRBNN4IF4jS7XOwit54sYBsMn7eGsTkoVHYujCxyoacgd_2Vl4sNVieQoPKcqLNWfYY0sJvBfug6dz_q3C4L5HnDpJDzyEtfbnbbhxvJwt5QYR40ioHGuH-K/3mh/XfKreECVTMeP84lrhOGb8w/h1/GiTbd6yUYEvMrue8YySSSKqVCHvo97JLfIDioRdweGw) Laurel City Councilmember Martin Mitchell just joined the growing list of local elected officials, community members, and leaders who have endorsed our campaign. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFAc3Wx6QcT5KV8XYmGwPOKEm6DYnwjAPkJ3TEn3ugdgU-6MUu7KtL0kD_ORp2Dt9eDtB2uydQGmjqs2G0aM2Hq7ErjqnXVyCSaO2yQJrpCRbXSIQAqxVBL5U9r4mbf1YNuA9tpR6zC9fUVCal-mD88-voUMFAH1RRDJgiSdjKipSWeFnoRVwtYkEFi8EYbil00UUedwugVee3JEeuVkis5aA_F8BdWaNm6ciQBzjmcL5a1uY0GBmV-ZfuM4OTCITFen23PfEx8n2nLtxLNrUW/3mh/XfKreECVTMeP84lrhOGb8w/h2/Jlqw67dSzsk4Z3HzunRRrM_28rD2I_66GnaweRuGcBc) **Just 50 days now until Election Day.** Every day counts and we’ll be reaching every voter we can – on the doors, on the phones, and meeting them where they are. [_**If you’re able to contribute today so we can hit our end-of-month goal before tomorrow, it’d mean a whole lot. .**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFAc3Wx6QcT5KV8XYmGwPOKEm6DYnwjAPkJ3TEn3ugdhGnZjsFdOXq5K2vqMlEM1wKIRip0gpRFR5qeaofaBPItlIMihvWv0YhG0jEEBXatWthMi3U7VpGsxUKdVlUiW-fHgXoONrPsskPR_sntGBFF4XZnK6DVKHO8IfIbYoA-Ltm56_5uLYk0cPCH3Kuy7nv607zNGE6EZR4RA4wQ4Ewxiun4g1u-kYVVtJaeC1hx_eH8W06-grW14VuvuRMDZ_uq8pEcXtIpSxM_97_fhEm/3mh/XfKreECVTMeP84lrhOGb8w/h3/M1dTCn-yLSg9uHf1wmPnyejUhZxtoUFG3lpxYQIZxxU) Thank you so much for being part of this movement with us! In solidarity, Mckayla Wilkes

---
| | Dear Friend, Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we’ve seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism.
---
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=22b29f367d3b41e6b0045d0f0eea10e0&_e=Aljyb1hamlfjcugvB_yxKeJWE7ecfVzWip6AlD0_agFLUHUifg_XBmLwKUap-_MXs_gqB9sQcYVdm2MawUzDBUrpAIkEv1OEaR-CQ0iGuwIOQML-2J0W9qYK8HNGiuIaQeGN3WHJ_uS_GsTXd3DAP5ltQMNc6HJF82F8X_cFYLHFIlKE0G9pRFTVEo0ZAsUgsJC9Cta4-B1HJuGv38FpAcWupKuqQxVbQNFM7NeMqV5W8vbwcT4MzJtr8-mFwcIKgFlPU7snYyGB43xZP-x889x_V2_Dfl8M3insPQfqtVlO3DvzbQR2gNimoZK14Ja9k7g7FQjR8Yf9AcSoIB7g-qgmwkqcrlxzC1KOewEzOdQS86dwbF-FzEMNK7-tPnZXrY0HWYhvk8fBS3LE9F85TMMC8-kWCQqOyf-Pm3J8J9vRCx0WvHc5WdzuLhfB08E69AIt31IDCX0gVTlQBZbr8DVZj19y0-J-tZHbHwgikqaj5hZu2Zwa7XCA-rE7-qB3)
---
| | **But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism?**
This is _precisely_ why we put together this brand new eBook, **[_The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=22b29f367d3b41e6b0045d0f0eea10e0&_e=Aljyb1hamlfjcugvB_yxKeJWE7ecfVzWip6AlD0_agFLUHUifg_XBmLwKUap-_MXs_gqB9sQcYVdm2MawUzDBUrpAIkEv1OEaR-CQ0iGuwIOQML-2J0W9qYK8HNGiuIaQeGN3WHJ_uS_GsTXd3DAP5ltQMNc6HJF82F8X_cFYLHFIlKE0G9pRFTVEo0ZAsUgsJC9Cta4-B1HJuGv38FpAcWupKuqQxVbQNFM7NeMqV5W8vbwcT4MzJtr8-mFwcIKgFlPU7snYyGB43xZP-x889x_V2_Dfl8M3insPQfqtVkEK-owCr9RUrYe2ElpZUeA6jLC6XhmaelrwMgvrLDZpMvDCVigSSZ80ALO4V92L10q0kzfsRy2LL4jVX3QPG_NR--1AmQAOc2bb9iR6vDZ295Y-FilCe1kIO6qz_ETbE3Ex_laocfrPJAPovzyczBAPuSD0vEseB9ynr1ovOqt5W2GiPspLwMNGN5oGDy-OwHyoc0yQ4QFDen62Ew8xhTx)** , from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.
This eBook consists of two papers—one from each scholar—written in conjunction with _The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism_. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being.
I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders.
**[Simply click here to request your free copy of _The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=22b29f367d3b41e6b0045d0f0eea10e0&_e=Aljyb1hamlfjcugvB_yxKeJWE7ecfVzWip6AlD0_agFLUHUifg_XBmLwKUap-_MXs_gqB9sQcYVdm2MawUzDBUrpAIkEv1OEaR-CQ0iGuwIOQML-2J0W9qYK8HNGiuIaQeGN3WHJ_uS_GsTXd3DAP5ltQMNc6HJF82F8X_cFYLHFIlKE0G9pRFTVEo0ZAsUgsJC9Cta4-B1HJuGv38FpAcWupKuqQxVbQNFM7NeMqV5W8vbwcT4MzJtr8-mFwcIKgFlPU7snYyGB43xZP-x889x_V2_Dfl8M3insPQfqtVkBFrZNjxHSgBOnh8h7O1RAQdo3XbxvEDEJ_bacI-e6CDquuvCe7o-qlPGWou--ywUj8t7ZRY8FRq3fJLaCQwMqZl5wCB4vQClmDHwUyZ1Qch1Y6uc_JgY6ryAD_oJ9R0wvB4HyzjiNzGTif810wJQU_rhXTaJ-H5Hi1Ec_20nxG5lbx8pq9SqRIpRWbmMWhymIKP8ZMjDJrWvx3deZ87rq)**
Thanks, Greg
Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Pelosi's Favorite Republican?
body:
Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi |
Peter,

In my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

So why is _Republican_ Liz Cheney playing on Nancy Pelosi's team?

Not only did she vote to impeach President Trump, praise Dr. Fauci, and slander Americans like you as a "danger" to our Democracy . . .

She's taken a leading role on Pelosi's Soviet-Style January 6th Commission!

[**This kind of betrayal cannot continue, which is why I hope you'll support my America First Primary Challenge against Liz Cheney with a $35 or more campaign contribution?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)

My name is Harriet Hageman and, unlike Liz Cheney - who lives in Northern Virginia - Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his radical Democrats hate - they run absolutely counter to the elitist values of Cheney and her establishment backers.

Unfortunately, it's those establishment backers - including Never-Trumpers at the Lincoln Project and NeoCons like John Bolton and John Boehner - who are now going all-in to keep Cheney in power.

Case in point, just a few weeks ago, Cheney held a ritzy fundraiser with Mitt Romney where she charged $10,000 a head for VIPs . . .

_On top of the nearly $5 million in campaign cash she's amassed from a steady stream of Never-Trumpers and Democrats!_

That's right - even the billionaire cousin of Far-Left Illinois Governor JB Pritzker shelled out $20,000 for Cheney!

**My friend, with the Never-Trump arm of the establishment working night and day to keep Cheney in power, I'm going to need patriots like you to keep my campaign to defeat her going.**

[**So please, won't you give an emergency $35, $50, $75, or $100 donation to my campaign so I can go dollar for dollar with her elitist backers?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)

It's unfortunately not hard to see why Democrats are teaming up with the establishment in taking Cheney's side.

Even before she voted to impeach President Trump on bogus charges in a sham hearing, she'd made it clear she sided with Big Government over _you_.

Sure, she loves to go around appearing on CNN and _60 Minutes_ lecturing us about how "principled" she is, but there's nothing principled about betraying the 70% of Wyoming voters who voted for President Trump.

Nor is it "principled" to sit side-by-side with Nancy Pelosi in a Soviet-Style hearing that uses Big Government to punish conservatives as political prisoners!

My friend, there are dozens of issues Liz Cheney could be tackling instead of this sham January 6th commission.

She could be investigating Afghanistan and Joe Biden's incompetence.

She could be looking into Nancy Pelosi's spying on conservative representatives.

She could be questioning Dr. Fauci's dangerous Gain-of-Function research.

**But instead, she's scoring compliments from far-left anchors at CNN in her never-ending vendetta against President Trump and his supporters!**

[**There's no room in Wyoming, or the republican party for rabid anti-Trumpers who will sell out the constituents they represent for some positive press time from fake news stations like CNN, and I hope you'll help me.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)

As I said, loyalty and freedom still mean something here in Wyoming. While DC might be full of back-door deals and shifting political winds, the men and women of my state value the Cowboy ethos and ethic of riding for the brand.

You see, back in the old West, Cowboys gave their promise to stay loyal to the people who hired them. To the people who paid them.

They made a choice to fight for the brand as it was one of their own, to keep their word to the brand, and to never betray it.

As a DC insider, Liz Cheney knows nothing about that, but I do.

My family put down roots on a ranch outside of Laramie 1879, where we've raised cattle ever since.

Out here, we have a strong work ethic and fierce independence, and we don't take kindly to Big Government Socialists like Nancy Pelosi trying to control us.

It's why I've spent my professional life as a lawyer battling Big Government and federal agencies trying to usurp our rights, and why I'll do it in Washington, too.

I'm also:
* 100% Pro-Life
* A strong supporter of our Second Amendment
* Totally and Completely Against Vaccine Mandates
* Believe in the need to fight for our Election Integrity
* A believer in our fight for election integrity
* Committed to government transparency and ending wasteful spending!

My friend, these are the issues conservatives need to put front and center: _Not_ joining Nancy Pelosi in some anti-American tribunal designed to persecute fellow Americans!

[**So please, would you consider giving a $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 donation to my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney in the next 3 days?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)

As I told you earlier in this letter, Cheney has $5 million in campaign cash ready to bail her out in this race.

With each passing day more and more Democrats flock to her side, desperate to keep their war on President Trump and you going.

Because of that, I need your urgent financial support in the next 3 days.

Of course, if you can't quite afford to give $35 at this time, I understand

[**But know a gift of any amount lets me know you support my Trump-endorsed campaign against Cheney**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r) **\--- and helps me crisscross the 97,914 square miles of Wyoming to talk to each and every voter in this state.**

My friend, I started by telling you how, out here in my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

And even though you may not live here, I hope these values mean something to you, too. I look forward you your response. And I want to thank you for your support.

Respectfully,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

PS: Remember - Democrat megadonors are shelling out tens of thousands for Liz Cheney. But while she has the support of Democrats and establishment career politicians like Mitt Romney, she doesn't speak for you and me.

[**Will you help me prove that by sending her packing with a $35 or more campaign donation to my primary challenge?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)

[DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)

---

| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60483920:6z2swBo_N:m:1:3317145305:4F1215D2BF6140BC95462B6F7BE2931D:r)
---

| Paid for by:
Hageman For Wyoming
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyenne, WY 82003
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 1, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6z2swBo_N). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6z2swBo_N)

name: Team Lopez
subject: I was really surprised to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it's Team Lopez, and we need to ask a favor.
Thousands of members of this movement have chipped in to fuel our campaign ahead of our can't-miss end-of-month deadline – and it means the world. We know you're part of this push to flip Arizona blue and finally defeat GOP extremism, so we were sure you'd be among those supporters. **But we're still coming up short, so the finance team showed us your record, and we were really surprised to see this: **
**BLUE ARIZONA SUPPORTER RECORD**
MEMBER: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
STATUS: **TOP SUPPORTER**
DONATED TODAY TO FLIP ARIZONA BLUE: ** NOT YET **
MOST IMPACTFUL GIFT: **$5**
DEADLINE: **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**

name: Val Demings
subject: I need your help to get our new TV ads on the air

body:
Polling shows me NECK AND NECK with Marco Rubio ...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45917381/348040092/23351974?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1133-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTdlNjcwYy00M2UwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vR3t3o3wfDP0fkCGWPN_R41lkDgDV8M5zWnfJR7abA0=)
Peter, I have a big update, so I'll get right into it:
**_FIRST,_** polling showed me NECK AND NECK with Marco Rubio, and the Miami Times reported that I'm rapidly closing the gap.

**_THEN,_** Marco Rubio and the GOP launched an attack ad blitz to smear my name, halt our movement's momentum and stop me from flipping Florida blue.

**_NOW,_****__** we're launching ads of our own to fight back against the GOP's attacks and spread my message to voters in every corner of the Sunshine State.
**But here's the problem, Peter: Getting ads on the air takes serious resources, so I need to raise another $20,000 by midnight tonight – or we'll cede the airways to Marco Rubio and his dark money allies. I cannot get ads up without your immediate grassroots support, Peter.**
**[So please, will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and Abby Finkenauer's? Whatever you give will help me get my TV ads on the air – and ensure Abby and I can flip these critical seats blue and expand our Senate majority. This close to Election Day, the stakes are make-or-break for Florida and our majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45917382/348040093/23351974?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1133-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTdlNjcwYy00M2UwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vR3t3o3wfDP0fkCGWPN_R41lkDgDV8M5zWnfJR7abA0=)**
I'm always grateful to have your support, but it's especially meaningful in critical moments like this.

Thank you.

– Val Demings

We are turning a critical corner in the race, and I need all hands on deck so I can continue to fight for everyday Americans - not Washington insiders and special interests. With how close this race is shaping up to be, a donation of any amount makes a HUGE impact. | "RAPID DONATE $20.22" | "RAPID DONATE $50" | "RAPID DONATE $100" | "ANOTHER AMOUNT" | For America, Chuck Morse | | | Chuck Morse is a republican candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. During his time as State Senate President, he has worked to cut taxes, deliver the most conservative budget in New Hampshire’s history, make sure NH had the lowest poverty rate in the country, and the Granite State even ranks at the top for freedom nationwide. He's running for the U.S. Senate this year to stop Maggie Hassan and the D.C. Democrats this year to protect the American Dream they are trying to destroy. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF CHUCK MORSE | | | | | | | | | | Friends of Chuck Morse | PO Box 106, North Salem, NH 03073 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Americans lash out at Biden for sky-high gas prices: "I'm out here walking around 'cause I cant afford the gas"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Support American Energy Independence NOW
Patriot, commuters in New Jersey got a chance to share their experience paying for the highest gas prices in history on Fox News, and the consensus is striking:
**_Anonymous: "Start drilling again. Do something... If we're getting our oil from somewhere let it be right here at home."_
______________

_Wayne: "I'm out here walking around 'cause I can't afford the gas"_
______________

_Richard: "[Gas prices have] almost doubled since Joe Biden got in office... It's been horrible."_
______________

_Gas Station Attendant: "We're struggling in America"_
______________ **
**[DEMAND AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE:
BUILD KEYSTONE XL NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60486922:JwovwBoNC:m:1:3299561967:62981DD10A7C4E69AE19D0C2D4B25EB1:r)**
You're hearing it every day, in every part of the country, from hard working Americans. We were absolutely devastated when Joe Biden canceled Keystone XL and stood back as gas prices hit record highs.
_Now every American understands that was A BIG FAT MISTAKE!_
The price for fuel has never been higher before, according to AAA, as gas hits $5 or even $6 PER GALLON in some parts of America. Everyone knows it: **We must resume drilling for our own oil -- like we did under President Trump -- build Keystone XL, and become ENERGY INDEPENDENT again!**
[**If you want to make a maximum impact to restore American Energy Independence, you 'll sign >>> this petition <<< to demand construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60486922:JwovwBoNC:m:1:3299561967:62981DD10A7C4E69AE19D0C2D4B25EB1:r)
Stand with Americans nationwide who want to crush prices at the pump. Stand with American Energy Independence and Keystone XL.

subject: Our Nation’s Sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
What legacy are we leaving behind? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9011988b9773/our-nations-sacrifice?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=ea8d3df357&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Friend, **Today we reflect on the valiant men and women who have gone before us.** As we enjoy the basic freedoms of “life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness,” it is important to acknowledge the ultimate sacrifice made by others on our behalf. **Their everlasting tribute inspires us to contemplate the legacy we are creating. ** As I meet with individuals all over the state, I often talk about leading with one hand reaching forward in gratitude for those who have gone before, and the other hand reaching back to support those who come after us. **I want to work hard to build bridges and create a legacy of lasting links.** We do not need another polarizing politician in Washington D.C. **Invest in building bridges and workable solutions by investing in our campaign today.**
---
|
---
| [DONATE $30](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=384ed0a1d3&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $30")
---
| | [DONATE $130](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=98c88ecc2c&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $130")
---
| [DONATE $530](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=ed968d6de1&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $530")
---
| As we honor those that have gone before us, let us recommit to being a little kinder, seeking solutions over political positions, and being grateful for the many rights and blessings we benefit from because of the sacrifices of others. **Happy Memorial Day!**
---
|
---

name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Honor our greatest heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
May their memory be a blessing. We will never forget their sacrifice.| | |
---
[](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=7cf94bf7d9f847cda286fd7cb849c5d1&_e=Yxqe85msF-jc37okqu_gy2a06-Od0f7D7sJgizMRlxC2Cz1cRz_lLU4TTdlQYmXi83h3J4-lUjMensHPXrjlSwlUOb7h0PtlE5Dk_Xuo8LbOXL2j3CmtldCqMitxNmRaANK7NJgwj2bBN5mcpk2TSMsZ3iLok0fkftb7jVAZpJ7WNdSKG8iHC43I5L4Vavnosbn-J2Yvp-3EYYeB4YjVbFOGXuNfCKPOtLdO3N6w7bg2EiL0mq-cNehDqwqpJeis5nBxpLKpwc2NCVI49jNxQA%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, Today, we remember and honor America’s greatest heroes: those who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedoms. As the grandson of Holocaust survivors and a World War II veteran, Memorial Day is especially meaningful for my family and me. That’s because we owe everything to the brave service members of the Greatest Generation who defeated evil and liberated Europe over 75 years ago. Today and always, we remember, honor, and thank all those who have given their lives in defense of our nation and our liberties. And we honor their memory, in part, by ensuring that their families, returning Veterans, and current service members receive the gratitude and care they deserve. Please take time today to honor the men and women who paid the ultimate price for our freedoms. May their memory be a blessing. We will never forget their sacrifice. \- Matt
---

clean_body: May their memory be a blessing. We will never forget their sacrifice.| | | | | Peter, Today, we remember and honor America’s greatest heroes: those who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedoms. As the grandson of Holocaust survivors and a World War II veteran, Memorial Day is especially meaningful for my family and me. That’s because we owe everything to the brave service members of the Greatest Generation who defeated evil and liberated Europe over 75 years ago. Today and always, we remember, honor, and thank all those who have given their lives in defense of our nation and our liberties. And we honor their memory, in part, by ensuring that their families, returning Veterans, and current service members receive the gratitude and care they deserve. Please take time today to honor the men and women who paid the ultimate price for our freedoms. May their memory be a blessing. We will never forget their sacrifice. \- Matt | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: PA's Progressive movement needs you now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

If ever there was a time to come together to fight those who are stripping us of our rights and our democracy, while allowing 18 year olds to buy weapons of war, it's now.

We are building a progressive movement in Pennsylvania and need you to join us — because doing nothing is not enough. We have to raise our voices and act now to advance progressive causes in government and our communities.

To do this, we must meet our goal for this month. We have only until MIDNIGHT TOMORROW to make our deadline.

Please donate today to give the progressive movement in PA the boost it needs.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=053022&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=053022&amount=10]

Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=053022]

We're breathing new life into this movement and we know you're with us. So, please donate what you can today.

Thank you.

Pat Clark
KPEF Board Chair
Keystone Progress

name: Rep. Demings
subject: 9 people just donated, and I’m counting on you to chip in too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Will you pitch in $5
| | |
---
Friend, I’m asking you for $5 .
Here’s why: Polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and, according to The Miami Times, I’m rapidly closing the gap.
I know $5 doesn't sound like much, but that's how we've built the momentum to make our race competitive. When thousands of people like you join our team with even $5 , we build a powerful and unstoppable movement.

But the GOP dark-money machine is determined to destroy our momentum and defeat me at any cost, so I’m leaning on this grassroots team again to help flip Florida blue.
**I've set a goal to raise another $20,000 before MIDNIGHT, but we’re still $2,592 short. And at this point in the election, when Rubio and the GOP are launching another round of vicious, nasty attack ads to defeat me, we need all the help we can get.**
In the time that it’s taken you to get to this point in the email, nine people have already donated $5 to join our team, but I’m counting on you to chip in too, friend. clean_body: | | | | We must hold onto this... | Peter, We wrote to you the other day to tell you how dire this May End-of-Month goal is, but we’re still just $8,360 behind. This isn't your average election year... The price of defeat is our freedom -- we can’t afford to fall behind. We only have until the End-of-Month deadline at MIDNIGHT to close this fundraising gap. Which is why we’ve secured a DOUBLE IMPACT for the next HOUR to put us over the top. | | | | | Thank you, Team Hageman \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Hageman Date: Sunday, May 29, 2022 Subject: Final Hours To: Peter, We have just 48 hours until our End-of-Month Fundraising Deadline. Harriet is a fighter, and she’s giving her all to this battle to save Wyoming from uniparty member Liz Cheney, but without patriots like you, we won’t be able to hit our fundraising goal, which is less than 48 hours away. This election is in the hands of the people. It’s up to you to step up and protect Wyoming. | | | | | As an attorney who has battled the Establishment for decades, Harriet is tough, and she knows what it takes to go up against the most entrenched career politicians, regulators and bureaucrats in the country. That’s what makes her so prepared to represent you. She isn’t relying on the establishment, and she isn’t relying on big-dollar donors -- she’s simply working hard to get the job done HERSELF. Right now, America needs a leader like Harriet. A tough and bold, strong woman to take on the corruption and obstruction plaguing our Nation day in and day out. She’s fighting hard, she’s ready to win, now she just needs you to step up, and help her crush her End-of-Month fundraising goal. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
Tomorrow is the last day of May, which means it's the last day of our end-of-month fundraiser. Election Day is June 7th, which means hitting our goal for May is REALLY important.
My opponent has Big Oil and the Republican party pouring money into his campaign — including $350,000 from oil on TV ads.
We have a team of hardworking volunteers going door-to-door across AD-80, and the grassroots support of folks like you.
I will fight nonstop for affordable housing, gas price relief, green energy solutions, and workers' rights in the Assembly. But first, I need your help.
Every dollar you give helps me and my team reach more undecided voters before Election Day. Will you chip in now so we have the resources we need to be as strong as possible in the next week? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_053022_EOM_A]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_053022_EOM_A [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_053022_EOM_A]
Thank you!
-- Georgette
http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly [http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly] http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80 [http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80] https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
A community organizer and the first LGBTQ Latina City Council President, Georgette Gómez has spent her life fighting for working families and underserved communities. And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us.
Georgette is running for AD-80, but corporate PACs and special interests are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race.
Can you give now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_Footer]

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=responsibility_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=responsibility_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
As a resident of Virginia's 8th, I recognize the duty we have to past and present servicemembers and their families as we are home to national memorials like the Iwo Jima Memorial, Arlington National Cemetery and the Air Force Memorial.
Although we can never repay the ultimate sacrifice of the fallen, we will strive every day to make sure we are worthy of it. My sincere gratitude goes out to their bravery and service today and every day.
memorial.day.blue.memory.honor [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/Red%20%26%20Blue%20Fireworks%20Memorial%20Day%20Facebook%20Post.png]
Victoria
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc]

_**ENDORSEMENT: Missouri Soybean Association**_ Vicky earned another key endorsement this week from the Missouri Soybean Association. This is Vicky's third endorsement from Missouri's agricultural community! Vicky is the best candidate to represent the interests of Missouri's farmers and ranchers!

_**NEW POLL: Vicky in Statistical Tie for First**_ Following the release of a new independent poll, Vicky's campaign manager released the following statement. "Eric Greitens is a damaged and disturbed candidate unfit to serve in any elected office. This new independent poll proves there is one candidate who can beat Eric Greitens to ensure we keep this Senate seat in Republican hands and that is Vicky Hartzler."

This Memorial Day, I am honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice, and honoring our soldiers who made it back alive.
There’s a lot more we could be doing for active and veteran service members, but too many in Congress believe that “supporting our troops” means funding more war.
On any given night, roughly 40,000 veterans are without shelter. Many come home with bodies and souls broken, and cannot find work. We neglect their medical and mental health care, and often break promises to fund their education.
**We owe our veterans benefits, not broken promises. And we can honor our veterans, both living and dead, by stopping endless wars, and guaranteeing jobs, housing, and healthcare.**
Honoring our veterans’ sacrifice also means protecting the freedom to vote, standing up for democracy, and fighting for the rights all of us are guaranteed.
So today, I’m recommitting to that fight for our community, our democracy, and our civil rights. Thank you for joining me, Peter Willis.
— Melanie

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. **[Chip in $10 or more to our campaign here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OLXsjS3D2uuB0-iHLg9LYJujfZ26OSqj56IZPCwCPAH66dlNtsrVDtFGnFw68-cvTlOcJNfgAiE_0rALte7dFUPAfVqfA-bGw5_Yx_SO5NctK8Y1yKhTbmyNrycKo57RouFksgyoaxRgMTrqYYyGbmbbHm_EHC7SDBctpr2cf_WZA7GLt4n4-bKZ-7jGj8wl-8ujPIRWWrYuRAOwRwsKwy-NN7owvbE7drwOhARJpH_2bUclRw_7uORp32Y83DpJfMhDCHi5YBWfT6W0wMhl_ksv4xmJky0dV2q7J_4c3Gf-s8VM4xT1sNNelzJUt5gFNg/3mh/R3A_Y_l8RQWSV7JGQhfxCA/h1/NeoMuG5uEz4uoFUW4vsG0yHzmOSRK_TOWee6tDcvQ_M)**

name: Ted Budd
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Freedom Isn’t Free| | |
---
Friends, This Memorial Day, we honor and remember those who faithfully served in our military and made the ultimate sacrifice for our nation. **The poet reminds us that our freedom is anything but free.** _In Flanders fields the poppies blow_ _Between the crosses, row on row,____That mark our place; and in the sky_ ___The larks, still bravely singing, fly_ _Scarce heard amid the guns below._ _We are the Dead. Short days ago_ _We lived, felt dawn, saw sunset glow,____Loved and were loved, and now we lie_ _ ____In Flanders fields._ _Take up our quarrel with the foe:__To you from failing hands we throw_ ___The torch; be yours to hold it high.____If ye break faith with us who die_ _We shall not sleep, though poppies grow_ _ ____In Flanders fields._ So today, let’s remember our nation’s fallen by renewing our commitment to the freedom they preserved with their sacrifice. God Bless, Ted Budd
---
| |
---
---

name: Max Steiner
subject: Happy Memorial Day, friend.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45918437/348044159/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQwYTNiOS00YWUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTnU8LWICPRStDDE2kzw-jK1DazTKK0906_p1jOZguo=)
Friend,

As a veteran, Memorial Day has a special meaning to me. It's the day that we, as a nation, remember everyone who has died in military service.

They died fighting for our country, but also for the ideals our country represents. Americans fought for democracy at home in the Revolutionary War, fought against slavery in the Civil War, and more recently fought for democracy in Europe during two World Wars and then Korea soon after. Not every intervention has been successful: fear of Communism led us to Vietnam and a desire for revenge led us to Afghanistan and Iraq - none of those wars succeeded in accomplishing long-term objectives, but not because of failures of the soldiers fighting them.

On this Memorial Day, I'm asking you to think of more than flags and tombstones. I want you to think about the ideals that our flag, sewn onto the right sleeve of every soldier, represents: democracy, liberty, opportunity, and equality. Generations fought for those ideals on the battlefield, but all Americans must fight for those ideals at home as well.

I know that things seem dark right now: we have a Republican Party ready to throw out elections, we have a war in Europe (and the threat of war in Taiwan), gun violence is out of control, and climate change threatens to upend our way of life. We're not going to solve these problems by throwing our hands up in despair.

So this Memorial Day, I'm asking you to vote. It's a right that generations of Americans have died to protect. Trust me, we didn't enlist so that people would reflexively say "thank you for your service" in every future social interaction. We enlisted because we care about American democracy - and you should care too.

As a soldier and an American, I'm proud to have served in our military overseas fighting for our country. As your Congressman, I would continue fighting for what our country represents in Washington. I would be honored to earn your support.

Max

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45918438/348044160/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQwYTNiOS00YWUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTnU8LWICPRStDDE2kzw-jK1DazTKK0906_p1jOZguo=)

name: Carole King
subject: Maggie is facing a tough reelection fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I've known Maggie since she was in the New Hampshire State Senate.
| | |
---
Please read this –
Women have been marching for generations, and I've been marching with them for decades.

**Now, more than ever, we are marching in numbers too big to ignore to ensure that our government stops attacking women’s fundamental rights. And we will VOTE!**

Each of us has a voice, and millions of voices are how we make the world better. After 50 years of protection, with Roe v. Wade on the verge of being overturned by SCOTUS, I’m heartened to see so many of us coming together to defend access to abortion. And it’s not just women. “Us” includes men who respect women and diverse people of all ages who march with us.

**The most important thing we can do right now is protect and expand our pro-choice majority in the Senate — and that starts with making sure my friend Maggie Hassan is reelected so she can amplify our voices.**
**[Will you join me in supporting Maggie by chipping in $3 to her reelection campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45919053/348046735/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1099-fr-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzk2N2RlYy00ZWUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Arw9nEuOyYRoh35Dj75keJdwLg4o9D6a1FsfMqjc0E=)**
I've known Maggie since she was in the New Hampshire State Senate. She’s been a lifelong champion for reproductive health care, and she isn't afraid of the unyielding anti-choice attacks.

And the attacks are coming. Mitch McConnell just announced a $9 million ad buy targeting New Hampshire — and every single one of her Republican opponents supports an anti-choice agenda.

Friend, whenever people in power have sought to crush hardworking Americans, we’ve always risen up to support leaders like Maggie who fight fiercely to improve life for their constituents and elevate the American people. With your help, Maggie will overcome Republicans’ dangerous attacks on everything we hold dear, and she’ll win by a margin too big to dispute!
**Republicans have an agenda that would crush us. Democrats want to lift us. Senator Hassan has used her voice and her vote to lift Granite Staters and American families, and with our help, she’ll continue to do that in the U.S. Senate.**

**[That's why I'm asking you to join me in this fight for light over darkness and chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to reelect Senator Maggie Hassan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45919054/348046736/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1099-fr-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzk2N2RlYy00ZWUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Arw9nEuOyYRoh35Dj75keJdwLg4o9D6a1FsfMqjc0E=)**

With so many problems to solve every day, you may feel overwhelmed or discouraged. But remember, you do have power. It lies in staying informed and engaged, joining your voice with others, and doing whatever you can to bring light to the world.

That’s why I love Maggie Hassan. She does that.

Thank you for staying engaged with me!

– Carole
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45919059/348046741/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1099-fr-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzk2N2RlYy00ZWUwLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Arw9nEuOyYRoh35Dj75keJdwLg4o9D6a1FsfMqjc0E=)

clean_body: I've known Maggie since she was in the New Hampshire State Senate. | | | Please read this – Women have been marching for generations, and I've been marching with them for decades. Now, more than ever, we are marching in numbers too big to ignore to ensure that our government stops attacking women’s fundamental rights. And we will VOTE! Each of us has a voice, and millions of voices are how we make the world better. After 50 years of protection, with Roe v. Wade on the verge of being overturned by SCOTUS, I’m heartened to see so many of us coming together to defend access to abortion. And it’s not just women. “Us” includes men who respect women and diverse people of all ages who march with us. The most important thing we can do right now is protect and expand our pro-choice majority in the Senate — and that starts with making sure my friend Maggie Hassan is reelected so she can amplify our voices. = I've known Maggie since she was in the New Hampshire State Senate. She’s been a lifelong champion for reproductive health care, and she isn't afraid of the unyielding anti-choice attacks. And the attacks are coming. Mitch McConnell just announced a $9 million ad buy targeting New Hampshire — and every single one of her Republican opponents supports an anti-choice agenda. Friend, whenever people in power have sought to crush hardworking Americans, we’ve always risen up to support leaders like Maggie who fight fiercely to improve life for their constituents and elevate the American people. With your help, Maggie will overcome Republicans’ dangerous attacks on everything we hold dear, and she’ll win by a margin too big to dispute! Republicans have an agenda that would crush us. Democrats want to lift us. Senator Hassan has used her voice and her vote to lift Granite Staters and American families, and with our help, she’ll continue to do that in the U.S. Senate. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With so many problems to solve every day, you may feel overwhelmed or discouraged. But remember, you do have power. It lies in staying informed and engaged, joining your voice with others, and doing whatever you can to bring light to the world. That’s why I love Maggie Hassan. She does that. Thank you for staying engaged with me! – Carole = Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, Kennedy Center honor, and two inductions in the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame. And she actually did write this email._ | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

name: Team Ryan
subject: I need to you to do this one thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3925%2E3611125%2EZwScjr ][IMG]

We’re in a slump, folks.

Online donations have really slowed down over the holiday weekend, and now
we’re at risk of falling short on our first End-of-Month goal of the
General Election.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13425?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3925%2E3611125%2EZwScjr ]So, before I take up any more of your time, can you chip in just a few
bucks to help us get back on track and hit our most important fundraising
deadline yet?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13425?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3925%2E3611125%2EZwScjr ]Donate

I know you’re busy. And there’s probably a million things you’d rather be
doing than reading this email. Trust me, I get it—there’s a million and
one things I’d rather be doing than bothering you right now.

But no matter how much I dread asking you for money (again), I know that’s
nowhere near as bad as JD Vance and his billionaire backers buying their
way into Ohio’s open Senate seat.

That’s why I’m always willing to send an extra email, or reach out to one
more voter—all to make sure I’m doing everything in my power to elect Tim
Ryan to the Senate.

But I’m not asking you to do everything. I just need you to do this

name: =?utf-8?Q?Aaron=20Rice?=
subject: Memorial Day – Remembering and Honoring
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/jxncrime-8132428?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Today, for the first time in twenty years, Americans are commemorating Memorial Day during peacetime and in the shadow of the two longest wars in U.S. history. Over that long period, it could be easy to grow numb to the sacrifice made by those who served and died in all of the wars America has fought in. With our longest wars now behind us, we should recommit to honoring the fallen and never forgetting their sacrifice.

It’s hard to remember now how different the world was – and how different we were – before 9/11. I was a senior in high school when the twin towers fell. As someone interested in history, even at that young age, I immediately understood the implications but most of my young peers did not.

That afternoon, at football practice, a friend of mine wondered aloud: “What do y’all think is going to happen now?” I quickly answered: “We were just attacked on American soil. We are going to war!” The other players laughed at that notion and resumed the game.

Today, most young people have grown up accustomed to America being involved in seemingly endless wars. But you have to remember that, in 2001, nobody my age had ever seen America at war, or even thought about the possibility of war in our lifetime. We had grown up thinking wars were things we read about in the history books, not things that might actually affect us.

Several of my friends are now among the fallen who sacrificed their very lives in service to our country, and it was the honor of my life to have served with them. I have visited with their wives, children, siblings, parents, and friends, and remembered the lives they led. I have seen the gaping holes they left behind in their communities. I’ve seen the sorrow felt by their family members along with their simultaneous pride in the honor and courage of their lost loved ones.

All of this taught me that honoring the fallen is more than just a platitude. Those who we are honoring are not just names on a wall. They are not an abstraction. They were real people, with their own hopes and dreams and plans for the future. Many of them dropped those plans to answer the call and never got the chance to come home and pick them back up. Memorial Day gives us the opportunity to pause, to think about their sacrifice, and to honor and remember them for as long as our great nation endures.
---
| |
---
In Liberty,

Aaron Rice
Director of MJI
---
| |
P.S. As we honor and remember all of our veterans who did not make it home, we should also view those veterans who did in an accurate light: as warriors, not victims. I wrote this column in the Clarion Ledger to share my thoughts on that. A link to the column can be found on our website [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b98c719baf&e=5703353baa).
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=eeac71bc53) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=eeac71bc53).

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: this Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Peter, today, I am remembering the brave Americans who we have lost in service to our country, and their loving families who are left behind.

I come from a family who respects the meaning of service to others. That's why I committed my life to service and became a registered nurse. It's how I raised my kids, too – my son and his wife are serving our country as Marines. It's hard to put into words the incredible pride that I feel watching them make such a deep and meaningful sacrifice.

To the Americans who have lost a loved one in service to our country, I stand with you. As someone who has experienced the loss of a loved one, I understand the deep grief you feel when someone you love is gone far too soon.

Words can never fill the gaping hole left by someone who has died fighting for our country. But I hope that we can provide some sense of peace and healing by honoring those lost in service so that we never forget their legacy, their bravery, and the love that they gave to so many of us.

With gratitude and sincere well-wishes,

Trudy Busch Valentine

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5sNAQQN7RUy0KByOPWpWlQ2?unsubscribedata=cNClb1HqsHRk6QRcvQfch4MUHvcBv4xpN55mu%2BYHwGuTiOKlOH0B2zUAoMTEgt%2FY0lWttOHOyycI5NYS%2Bc60%2Ba22CeAVKjAVo859U749ABFQOy775nZ2Fg%2BTheEYIl8cWPGSABR0Ikscrgt5IHUY3qBPGfmk64VkKFr9UkhATn7iaeaXjhGXqQ3i4z1VWeIVzn2gYfE5T0zg%2B6us9AsyAae9%2FsLOgjDbKmqYznrL7vbPunBptUWnz%2BBzaxmnBojC%2FVbJpIsHhRJRu4yAsIlLaq8jzIkn6iAuJwbSfDHEd921atOdORSSxS%2BJG673gHxSGmgS%2BU0F0xYR51DzFt2sEsa1ragnJ7%2FOFXieoT8L6NSxfhZM8H5IAea0rhMELeq1Ff8Ao6YIjfUC8%2B6cLQVlTZqWnQVeqRFfc33YDkUHP74%3D
